enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.title: Enhanced Storage
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.enableOv: Toggle the unified storage overlay on or off. When disabled, the vanilla chest GUI is shown.
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.enableRi: Toggle the overlay for the Rift Storage menu. Independent of the main storage overlay.
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.showStor: Display the storage overview card beside the inventory. Hiding it re-centers the inventory.
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.backgrou: Visual style for the overlay background: light, dark, or transparent.
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.maxPageP: Number of page columns shown in the scroll panel (1–5).
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.horizont: Gap (px) on the left and right of the overlay.
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.overview: Gap (px) above the overlay. Lower = taller overlay with more page rows.
Gap (px) below the overlay. Lower = taller overlay with more page rows.
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.extraTop: Extra top/bottom margin (px) to leave room for Skyblocker quick-nav buttons.
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.extraBot: Extra Margin for RRV Search Bar
Extra bottom margin (px) to leave room for the RRV search bar.
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.showItem: Display item tooltips when hovering over cached items on non-active pages.
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.remember: Keep the previous search term when the overlay is reopened.
Keep the previous scroll position when the overlay is reopened.
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.autoScro: When to automatically scroll so the currently open page is visible.
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.overlayS: Mouse-wheel scroll speed for the overlay (1–60).
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.saveCurs: Keep the cursor where it was when moving between storage pages.
Time window (seconds) during which the saved cursor position is restored.
